name: ExtensionCoverage_Class_Value
title: R5: value additional types
description: R5: `Coverage.class.value` additional types (Identifier) additional types from child elements (assigner, period, type)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Coverage.class.value` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Coverage.class.value` 1..1 `Identifier`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Coverage.class.value` 1..1 `Identifier`
*  R4B: `Coverage.class.value` 1..1 `string`
*  R4: `Coverage.class.value` 1..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Coverage.class.value` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Coverage.class.value` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Coverage.class.value` do not cover the following types: Identifier.
The mappings for `Coverage.class.value` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: assigner, period, type.

element.definition: R5: `Coverage.class.value` additional types (Identifier) additional types from child elements (assigner, period, type)
element.comment:
Element `Coverage.class.value` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Coverage.class.value` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Coverage.class.value` do not cover the following types: Identifier.
The mappings for `Coverage.class.value` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: assigner, period, type.
For example, the Group or Plan number.

element.definition: The alphanumeric identifier associated with the insurer issued label.
element.comment: For example, the Group or Plan number.
